ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Name of the dataset file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset and its contents */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset file (e.g., FASTQ, BAM, TSV) */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., RNA-seq, Proteomics) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User or process that generated the dataset */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last date and time the dataset was modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset this metric is associated with */,
  "ratio_of_range" REAL /* Ratio of biological ranges in the dataset */,
  "inverse_std_dev" REAL /* Inverse standard deviation of the measurements */,
  "smoothing_error" REAL /* Smoothing error calculated during data analysis */,
  "area_under_curve" REAL /* Area under the curve for the experimental results */,
  "normed_area_under_curve" REAL /* Normalized area under the curve for comparison */,
  "method_used" TEXT /* Method or tool used for analysis */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the metrics */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value for statistical significance */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the metric entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the metric entry was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last date and time the metric entry was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role in the organization (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to access the dataset */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Summary of changes made in this version */,
  "version_by" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the versioned file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., RNA Sequencing, Proteomics) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the category was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last date and time the category was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_categories" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "category_id")
)
